entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for trichome inheritance.

entities.name: LEAF TRICHOMES
entities.description: The presence or absence of hair-like appendages on the leaf surface.

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of trichomes on the abaxial leaf surface.

entities.name: SINGLE-CROSS MATING
entities.description: The breeding process of crossing two distinct parents to produce segregating generations.

entities.name: TR GENE
entities.description: The single recessive gene locus that controls the presence of leaf trichomes.

entities.name: SEGREGATION RATIOS
entities.description: The proportions of phenotypes observed in offspring used to determine the mode of inheritance.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The measure of the proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic variation.

entities.name: FILIAL GENERATIONS
entities.description: The F3 and F4 generations used to estimate heritability.
